description: Concatenate all of the items in the input filelist into a single large file.
author: Peter Carr, Broad Institute
plan:
## ConcatenateFilelist GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ConcatenateFilelist is a GenePattern module that Concatenate all of the items in the input filelist into a single large file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: filelist, output.filename
- Optional: num.header.lines

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>ConcatenateFilelist.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-annotations.jar<path.separator><libdir>jopt-simple-3.3.jar org.genepattern.module.concatenatefilelist.ConcatenateFilelist <filelist> <num.header.lines> <output.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: filelist
parameters.description: a text file containing a list of file paths

parameters.name: num.header.lines
parameters.description: specify number of header lines so that they are output only once

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: The name of the output file
